text.title: Claude Code Hooks Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether claude-code-hooks applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the automation needed for every X event AND a simpler memory preference cannot suffice?

branch.conclusion: Use a slash command or a saved memory preference.

example.description: When `yes AND security_sensitive` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r2` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
